verses.text: Tu-in Aaron' tapate Nadab leh Abihu in amau' paknamtui beel tuak la-in, a sungah mei koih uh a, a tungah paknamtui koihin, Topa in amau' tungah tua banga thu a piak ngeiloh a sianglo mei, Topa' mai-ah a pia uh hi
Topa' omna mun panin mei hong paikhia-in amaute kang a, Topa' mai-ah a si uh hi

Tua ciangin Moses in Aaron' kiangah, “ Topa in, ‘Ka kiang nai-a a omte kiangah keimah a siangtho-in ka kilak ding a, mi khempeuh' mai-ah keimah hong kiminthangsak ding hi,’ ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi. Aaron pauloin a om hi
Moses in Aaron' pa' sanggampa Uzziel' tapate Mishael leh Elizafan samin amaute kiangah, “Hong pai un la biakbuk panin giahphual pualamah na sanggamte uh puakhia un,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin amaute in hong naihin, Moses' sawl bangin giahphual pualamah amau' puantungsilh mah uh tawh amaute a puakhia uh hi.

Tua ciangin Moses in Aaron leh a tapate Eleazar leh Ithamar kiangah, “Na lu uha na sam uh phiahsak kei un la, na puante uh balkek kei un. Tua bangin na hih uh leh note si-in, mihon khempeuh tungah Topa' hehna hong tung ding hi. Ahih hangin na mipih uh, Israel mihon buppi pen, Topa' mei in a katlup mite' hangin dahin kap thei ding uh hi
Kikhopna buk kong panin a pualamah paikhia kei un. Na pai uh leh na si ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa' nilh sathau note' tungah om hi,” a ci hi. Moses' gen bangin amaute a gamta uh hi
Topa in Aaron kiangah

“Nang hita leh na tapate hita leh kikhopna bukah na pai uh ciangin leenggahzu hita leh khamtheih zu hita leh ne kei un. Na nek uh leh na si ding uh hi. Tua pen na suan na khakte uh tungah khang tawntungin ngeina kip khat hi ding hi
Note in a siangtho leh a mawkmawk, leh a nin leh a siang na khen ding uh hi
Topa in Moses tung tawnin amaute' tunga a gensa thukhamte khempeuh note in Israel mite a hilh ding na hi uh hi,” a ci hi

Moses in Aaron leh a omlai a tapate Eleazar leh Ithamar kiangah, “ Topa' tungah meihal biakna sung panin a vallai ahi an tawh biakna la un la, tua pen a siangtho pen ahih manin silngo sawhlohin biakna tau gei-ah ne un
Tua an pen Topa' tungah meihal biaknate lak panin nang leh na tapate' kaih ding ahih manin a siangtho mun khatah na ne ding uh hi. Tua bang ding mahin kei' tungah thu hong kipia hi

Ahih hangin a kivei a iik leh a kipia a pheite pen nang leh na tapate leh na tanute in a siangtho mun khatpeuhah ne ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen Israel mite in thunuama a biakpiakna panun nang leh na tapate' kaih dinga hong kipia ahi hi

Topa in a thupiaksa bangin a kipia a phei leh a kivei a iikte ahih leh Topa' mai-ah vei-a biakna-in vei dingin amaute in meihal biakna sathau tawh hong paipih ding uh a, tua pen nang leh na tapate in a tawntungin na kaih ding uh ahi hi,” a ci hi
Tu-in Moses in khialhna hanga biakna keel tawh kisai thu limtakin kan a, na kihal khin mawk hi. Aaron' tapa a omlai Eleazar leh Ithamar-te' tungah amah heh a

“Note in mihonte-a' dingin Topa' mai-ah kilemna bawlin, amau' mawhna a kilakkhiat theihna dingin note' tungah hong kipiasa a siangtho sa pen khialhna hanga biakna hi napi, bang hangin a siangtho mun khatah nelo na hi uh hiam
En un, biakbuk sungah a sisan kipaipih lo hi. Ka thupiaksa bangin note in biakbuk sungah na nek dingun a kilawm ahi hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Aaron in Moses kiangah, “En in, tuni-in amaute in Topa' mai-ah amau' khialhna hanga biakna leh amau' meihal biakna pia khinzo uh hi. Tua bang hinapi hih bang thute kei' tungah hong tung veve hi. Khialhna hanga biakna tuni-in a ne hi leng, Topa' muhna-ah san'huai ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi
Moses in tua thu a zak ciangin a lungkim hi.
